narrative:
Precinct York Township (precinct in Morgan County) has 482 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
